Text.text: * Dropped support for 10E legacy * Gaining or Decreasing CP via widget or overlay now is logged in chat for tracking. * Added colours to disposition picker for better matching * Added deployment picker based on disposition, currently we only have 3 deployment zones per disposition match up but that will change as GW shows more stuff. * Added VP limitations for primary, secondaries and total scores. * Changed scoreboard buttons * Added the option to change table mat (more to come!) * Lots of new tokens! * Major code cleanup.

Button.tooltip: getAllObjects() vs Physics.cast box on the Red dice mat
getAllObjects() vs Physics.cast box on the Blue dice mat
Run the RNG diagnostic on the Red dice roller
Select objects first, then click: writes their GUIDs into a tile's description to copy/paste
Debug only: fetch every missing Battlemaster lite layout payload into the spawner cache
Debug only: report whether the Battlemaster spawner cache is empty
Debug only: populate the Battlemaster cache using the BTTF Ruins theme
Debug only: populate the Battlemaster cache using the Armageddon Desert theme
Debug only: populate the Battlemaster cache using the Grimdark Calibration/BTTF theme
